goal: Measure whether an executable kernel/template substrate can express held-out MBPP tasks that remain unsolved by a large direct-sampling pool, before training any model to configure that substrate.

task_selection.selection_rule: tasks with no hidden-correct candidate in the local K128 candidate-pool artifact

gates.weak_gate_1: Does any readable executable substrate candidate solve the residual tasks on hidden tests?
gates.strict_gate_1: Does a reusable substrate, not task-specific hand-authored templates, solve the residual tasks on hidden tests?
gates.gate_2: If hidden-test coverage is nontrivial, inspect visible-pass/hidden-fail rate before any training targets are trusted.
